mapper.select:
/* selectTransaction sql */ select ID, NAME, DESCRIPTION, USE_YN, REG_USER FROM TBL_SAMPLE WHERE 1 = 1
AND ID LIKE CONCAT(#{ID},'%')
AND NAME LIKE CONCAT(#{NAME},'%')
ORDER BY ID, NAME, DESCRIPTION, USE_YN, REG_USER

/* selectTransaction sql */ select ID, NAME, DESCRIPTION, USE_YN as use_yn_yn, REG_USER FROM TBL_SAMPLE WHERE 1 = 1
AND ID LIKE CONCAT(#{ID},'%')
AND NAME LIKE CONCAT(#{NAME},'%')
ORDER BY ID, NAME, DESCRIPTION, USE_YN, REG_USER
select DEPT_CD AS CODE, DEPT_NAME AS CODE_NAME FROM TB_DEPT

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ID , NAME , DESCRIPTION , USE_YN , REG_USER , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ID DESC) AS ROWNUM FROM TBL_SAMPLE /* 조건 처리 WHERE ID LIKE '%000%' */ ) AS sub ORDER BY ROWNUM LIMIT #{records} OFFSET #{recordsOffset}
select count(*) as totalCount from TBL_SAMPLE

SELECT MST_CODE , MST_NAME , DET_CODE as CODE , DET_NAME as NAME , USE_FLAG FROM TBl_COMMON_CODE WHERE MST_CODE IN
#{item}
